cleavage agent: 1 μg of trypsin (Sus scrofa) was added
collision energy: fragmented by low energy CID, 35% collision energy
instrument: An LTQ OrbitrapVelos (Thermo Fisher) was used
labeling: samples were analyzed by mass spectrometry
reduction reagent: Samples were reduced with 10 mM DTT
reduction concentration: Samples were reduced with 10 mM DTT
